title: Add error on `localparam` value from hierarchical path

features.name: localparam initialized from parameter with hierarchical read under override
features.description: Code should include a module with a parameter and a localparam initialized from that parameter, instantiated with a parameter override, where the localparam value is read via hierarchical path from outside the module
features.snippet:
module foo #(parameter int X = 1); localparam int Y = X; endmodule
module tb; localparam int MY_X = 2; foo #(.X(MY_X)) inst (); localparam int MY_Y = inst.Y; endmodule

features.name: parameter override affects localparam computed from parameter accessed via hierarchical path
features.description: Code should include a parameterized module where localparam equals parameter, with external hierarchical access to localparam under parameter override conditions
